ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the climate model */,
  "model_institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization that developed the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., GCM, RCM) */,
  "model_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the model */,
  "model_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the model (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "model_publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was published */,
  "model_contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the model */,
  "model_publication_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication describing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the climate experiment */,
  "experiment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., historical, future projection) */,
  "experiment_objective" TEXT /* Brief objective of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "experiment_funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "experiment_publication_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication describing the experiment */,
  "experiment_contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, guest) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance record */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the climate_variables table */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Description of the processing steps applied to the data */,
  "source_data_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the source data */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for processing the data */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the processing was performed */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who processed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the climate_variables table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
